## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` is green locally (schema + tests + drift gate + ready gates)
- [ ] I edited `data/*.yml` / source files — never generated artifacts (README tables, llms.txt)
- [ ] New claims carry URLs and dates; unverifiable ⇒ marked UNVERIFIED
- [ ] New skills have a Verification section with a real assertion
